examples: He was free to marry whomever he chose.
If you can start the conversation with a question other than "What do you do for a living?", you'll be able to get a lot more interesting conversation out of whomever it is you're talking to.
But I also find that it allows me to be whomever I want.
You can have your staff or whomever call me anytime today, tonight, or tomorrow.
Whomever buys the Kings will pay a record price for an NBA franchise excluding an arena.
